criteria.name: Lead role in distinguished productions
criteria.evidence: Principal/lead creative author of original scores for two award-winning feature films and a AAA video game
criteria.rationale: Lead composer credit on productions with documented critical recognition supports this criterion strongly, though 'award-winning' attribution to the productions themselves (vs. the scores) should be clarified.

criteria.name: National or international recognition
criteria.evidence: Emmy nomination for Outstanding Music Composition; Game Audio Network Guild award; 40 million streams across platforms
criteria.rationale: An Emmy nomination and a GANG award are nationally recognized honors in the field, and streaming reach reflects broad public exposure.

criteria.name: Reviews & press
criteria.evidence: Work featured in Variety and Film Music Magazine
criteria.rationale: Coverage in Variety (a major entertainment trade publication) is meaningful, but the description does not specify the nature or depth of coverage, which affects evidentiary weight.

criteria.name: Record of major commercial or critical success
criteria.evidence: Emmy nomination; GANG award win; 40 million streams; scores tied to AAA video game (a major commercial release category)
criteria.rationale: Combination of critical recognition (Emmy nom, GANG win) and commercial reach (streaming numbers, AAA title) provides multi-dimensional support.

criteria.name: Recognition from organizations & experts
criteria.evidence: Member of the Society of Composers & Lyricists; GANG award from peer organization
criteria.rationale: SCL membership is professional but generally open to qualifying members and does not itself demonstrate extraordinary recognition; the GANG award from a peer-judged body is stronger but additional letters from recognized experts in film/TV/game music would reinforce this criterion.

criteria.name: High salary or remuneration
criteria.evidence: No compensation figures, fee rates, or contract terms described
criteria.rationale: No evidence was provided regarding salary, per-project fees, or remuneration relative to peers in the field.

gaps: Provide specific compensation data (project fees, per-episode rates, or salary) benchmarked against peers to address the high remuneration criterion
Clarify and document the nature of Variety and Film Music Magazine coverage (e.g., dedicated feature vs. brief mention) to strengthen the reviews & press criterion
Obtain expert letters from recognized figures in film, TV, or game music attesting to extraordinary ability and peer standing
Distinguish whether 'award-winning productions' refers to the productions receiving awards or the scores specifically, and document accordingly
SCL membership alone is thin — identify any leadership roles, invited panels, jury service, or commissions that demonstrate recognition within the organization
disclaimer: This is general informational guidance only, not legal advice. Immigration law is fact-specific and changes frequently. An attorney of record licensed to practice law is required to review your petition and advise on your situation before anything is filed with USCIS.
